changes.old: This beardless boy smells of good health!
changes.new: This beardless boy must be tired of living!
changes.reason: Restores Gemini's idiomatic rendering; 'gli puzza la salute' means to be tired of living / asking for a beating, not a literal 'smells of good health'.
changes.context_sentence: set foot in it again.  "This beardless boy must be tired of living!" replied Bonacina, makin

changes.old: however rare and restrained as befitted every young English woman
changes.new: however rare and sparing in every English young lady
changes.reason: Removes the invented 'as befitted' (a notion of propriety absent from source and both drafts); restores Claude's faithful 'rare and sparing in every English young lady'.
